## Validation

## Safety / Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No auto-submit or auto-click behavior
- [ ] No programmatic writes to HH form fields
- [ ] No hidden HH fetches
- [ ] No broad permissions added
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] AI/n8n payload behavior is explicit, opt-in, and documented
